title: machine learning model

prompt.task: Create a new history in Galaxy and upload the datasets. Train a machine learning model to classify images based on the given training dataset and evaluate its performance on the test dataset.

tool.name: Image Learner
tool.parameters: Read the dataset and select the appropriate parameters for training the model. Use the 'selected_HAM10000_img_metadata_aug.csv' as the training dataset and the images in 'skin_image.zip' as the test dataset. Select the target column for classification and evaluate the model's performance using ROC-AUC. Watch out for data leakage

must_have: Select the best model architecture to reach a Test ROC-AUC of at least 0.85. Try at least 5 times with different architectures and parameters to reach the best performance before stopping the experiment. Keep track of why the model is not performing well and what changes you made to improve it.

experiment_outputs.target: what column was selected as the target for classification
experiment_outputs.ROC-AUC: look in the report for the test ROC-AUC result
